title: StorageContainerConfig
description: Definition of the properties contained by an object store container template config file

metadataEntry.description: Config properties for a container found in a user-supplied metadata config

dataPath.title: Data Path
dataPath.description: Literal path relative to the bucket root, or a glob-style pattern. Use a single-star wildcard for one path level, a double-star wildcard for any depth, and a question mark for a single character.

structureFormat.title: Structure Format
structureFormat.description: Expected file format for schema inference. Leave blank to auto-detect from the file extension. Ignored when Unstructured Data is enabled.

unstructuredData.title: Unstructured Data
unstructuredData.description: When true, files matching the glob dataPath are cataloged as individual containers without schema extraction. Use for images, documents, and other non-tabular files.

unstructuredFormats.title: Unstructured Formats
unstructuredFormats.description: Legacy option for literal dataPath entries. List of file extensions (e.g. png, pdf, jpg) to catalog as unstructured. Prefer the unstructuredData flag with a glob dataPath for new configurations.

depth.title: Depth
depth.description: Depth of the data path in the container

separator.title: Separator
separator.description: For delimited files such as CSV, what is the separator being used?

isPartitioned.title: Is Partitioned
isPartitioned.description: Flag indicating whether the container's data is partitioned

autoPartitionDetection.title: Auto Partition Detection
autoPartitionDetection.description: When true and dataPath is a glob, automatically detect Hive-style partition columns from matched paths (e.g. year=2024/month=01). Ignored for literal paths.

excludePaths.title: Exclude Path Segments
excludePaths.description: Path segments to skip during glob discovery. Any file whose path contains one of these segments is ignored. Common defaults applied when unset: _delta_log, _temporary, _spark_metadata, .tmp, _SUCCESS.

excludePatterns.title: Exclude Patterns
excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude during glob discovery. Any file matching one of these patterns is skipped.

partitionColumns.title: Partition Columns
partitionColumns.description: Explicit partition column definitions. Overrides auto-detection when provided.

dataTypeDisplay.title: Data Type Display
dataTypeDisplay.description: Display name for the data type (optional).

entries.description: List of metadata entries for the bucket containing information about where data resides and its structure
